Xi Jinping:
Biography of Xi Jinping

Birth and Early Life (1953-1975):
Xi Jinping was born in 1953 in Beijing. His father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping’s father Xi Jinping, who was a politician, and his mother was a teacher. In his childhood life he was made aware about education and politics under the Communist Party of China. In 1969 he was sent to an agricultural area of Shaanxi province, where he spent life with farmers, which shows an important role for rural development and for the people of society in his political viewpoint.

Education and Political Beginning (1975-1980):
In 1975 he obtained a degree in chemistry from Tsinghua University of Beijing. After this he took part in the young writers association of the Communist Party of China, where his political skills developed. In 1980 he was appointed as a political officer in Fujian province, where he worked for economic and social development.
